system_prompt: Act as a math student responding to the tutor.

turns.tutor_turn:
Now try this similar problem on your own without any hints. Show your reasoning step by step:

Peter and his dad Rupert shared the same birthday.  To make it special, they each got their own birthday cake.  Peter has 12.4 candles on his cake.  Rupert is 4.0 and 1.3/2.6 times older than Peter.  How many candles will be on Rupert's cake?
